special_mechanics.name: Dash
special_mechanics.description: Standard dash move allowing rapid horizontal movement

special_mechanics.name: Superdash
special_mechanics.description: Enhanced dash move where The Mask runs at supersonic speed

special_mechanics.name: Sneaking/Invisibility
special_mechanics.description: Sneaking move that makes The Mask invisible to enemies

special_mechanics.name: Morph Meter Powers
special_mechanics.description: Special moves powered by Morph meter including: mallet attack, tornado, massive guns, and living horn. Meter depletes with use and slowly replenishes to smaller amount

physics_values.meter_replenishment: gradual, capped at lower value after depletion

tier_notes: Tier 3 data: Only qualitative gameplay information available from Wikipedia source. No precise physics parameters, movement speeds, gravity values, or sub-pixel system data documented. Game features varied abilities and level navigation mechanics but quantitative physics details not disclosed.
